summary: Iteration 6 — Verified GRAVITY ROW-FILL jar packing. All 6 test scenarios pass: full monochrome rows (red/green/yellow bottom-up), stratification order (momentum lowest, joy highest), boundary rows are the only mixed rows, no poms vanish during completion, joy completion lands on top, GOAL=100 text intact. No console errors.

test_results.test1_row_fill_monochrome_54poms: PASS — 6 full rows of 9; bottom 3 rows momentum (rgb 190,18,60), middle 2 consistency (77,124,15), top row joy (234,179,8)
test_results.test2_stratification_order: PASS — avg top: momentum=552, consistency=479.5, joy=436 (bottom→top = greatest→least)
test_results.test3_boundary_only_mixed_40poms: PASS — 5 rows, bottom 2 full momentum, boundary rows mom+cons and cons+joy, top partial 4 joy; every non-topmost row = 9 poms
test_results.test4_no_vanish_on_completion: PASS (functionally) — pom count stayed at 41 across all timepoints (50/300/800/1800/2500ms); new momentum pom settled in bottom row; all existing poms remained opacity=1. Landing pom animates from opacity 0→1 over 250ms as per spec (initial opacity 0.254 at t=50ms is the landing pom itself, not an existing pom vanishing).
test_results.test5_joy_completion_ends_on_top: PASS — new joy pom's top Y matches the topmost row after settle

critical_code_review_comments: Jar.jsx implementation is clean and matches spec (PERROW=9, STEP=29, row-major bottom-up left-to-right, greatest count first). Existing poms use initial={false} so they smoothly transition to new positions without re-mounting — verified no vanishing.
seed_data_creation: Seeded localStorage['pomjar_poms'] and ['pomjar_tasks'] via page.evaluate then reload; two configurations tested: 27+18+9=54 and 20+15+5=40.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Row-fill packing (Jar.jsx v6) verified end-to-end. Use data-testid=jar-body → span.rounded-full and cluster by top Y (~10px tolerance) to detect rows. Colors detected via computed backgroundImage gradient substring match.
